headline: Investor Sells $35 Million Sunstone Hotel Stake as Lodging REIT Trails Broader Market
summary: This lodging REIT owns and manages roughly 7,000 rooms across major U.S. markets under top hospitality brands.

headline: This REIT Stock Is Down 40% in a Year, but One Fund Just Disclosed a New $38 Million Investment
summary: This REIT operates the world’s largest network of temperature-controlled warehouses, serving food producers and major retailers worldwide.
